title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Udemy India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Udemy India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Udemy India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Udemy India:
Udemy India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Udemy India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
